resources.string: Please enable Bluetooth to use spam features
You have not added custom remotes yet. Tap "+" to import ".ir" files.
File %s not found or contains no commands
While you point your phone at a TV or other device, it will not respond to remote commands and will ignore them
TV database not found or contains no entries
Flipper database not found or empty
%s is paired but HID connection is not complete. Check HID profile in Bluetooth settings.
Connection is taking more than 10 seconds. Restart Bluetooth and reopen HID Keyboard section.
Read NFC tag and show full information
Create URL tag and emulate NFC Forum Type 4
NFC is off. Enable NFC in phone settings.
You have no NFC tags yet
HCE is not supported on this device.
Set Dolphy as default payment app.
Clear user NDEF data on a writable tag
Hold the tag near the phone to erase data
Hold the tag near the phone to write data
Allow contacts access to pick a number
This contact has no phone number
IR remote database from TV folder (best IR database)
Send power off signals to all TVs
Prevents others from controlling your jammed device with remote
US radar and BLE/Wi-Fi device detector
Safe stress testing of personal network infrastructure and stability validation of your own link under extreme load.
Allows seeing around: motion sensors, radars and jammers
Search for Flipper Zero, BLE spammers and Wi-Fi deauther devices nearby.
Choose a video to send to your TV
Your microphone records from paired devices will appear here
No paired devices in this list yet
This feature is experimental and is still being tested. Share your experience in the @oosthemes channel chat on Telegram to help improve it.
Source detection is approximate: the system sees energy in 15–22 kHz range, so false positives nearby are possible.
No Flipper Zero, BLE spammers or Wi-Fi deauther devices detected
Location services are off. Enable “Location services” to scan Wi‑Fi.
To scan Wi‑Fi networks, enable Location services (GPS/Network) in your phone settings.
Please connect to \"%s\" in Wi‑Fi settings.
Failed to connect to the network
Network scanning, WI FI DoS and password Bruteforce
Location permission is required to display Wi‑Fi networks.
Enter the Wi‑Fi password to safely validate \"%1$s\".
Android 10 or newer is required for Wi‑Fi specifier connections.
Choose network \"%1$s\" and connect to it
Connect to \"%1$s\" in Wi‑Fi settings and return to the app.
The app did not detect a connection to the selected network.
Preparing to send UDP packets to 255.255.255.255:8888
JS Runner is not implemented in Android version
Updater is only available in firmware
U2F is not supported in Android version
Bluetooth permissions are required for advertising
You have not added any devices yet.
We recommend renaming your Bluetooth device to something inconspicuous for better privacy.

Dolphy (%1$s)
Some resources and code are derived from the Flipper Zero firmware project.
Copyright © Flipper Devices.
Licensed under the GNU GPL.
Bluetooth permissions are required for scanning.
Import a .txt with DuckyScript via the + button
Could not send text to notepad
This device does not support BLE advertising
Payload too long for legacy advertising
Could not import commands from file
Database failed to load (see logcat UniversalRemotes)
QR code generation and local audio control
Play sounds via QR inside the local network
Connect both devices to the same local network, start the server, and open the QR code on the other device. The link is not available from the internet.
Tap the button to start the server
UART bridge via USB-OTG or built-in ports (Root required)
Root permissions are required for Serial Terminal
Library of simple NFC tags with links
Location permission required to scan for Wi-Fi printers.
Search and test Bluetooth audio devices. Connect to speakers and headphones.
Manual connection required in Bluetooth settings
NFC tag emulation with website for remote audio control
Discover devices on the current Wi-Fi network
No cameras found on the network
No IP cameras were found on your network
Discover devices in current Wi-Fi network

Your Dolphy reached Level 1 !\n\nDolphy is a free Android app for mobile pentesting that doesn\'t require Root rights. We recommend subscribing to the developer\'s Telegram channel so you don\'t miss updates!
Create and save your QR codes
Stream video to TV via Chromecast, DIAL, DLNA and UPnP
BLE chat with other Dolphy users
Enable password groups for brute-forcing. Order = processing order.
This feature allows connecting to speakers and headphones without confirmation
